name: @graypirate/tabula
description: Flexible object-oriented relational storage for agents

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/src/storage/db && cp src/storage/db/schema.sql dist/src/storage/db/schema.sql && chmod 755 dist/CLI/index.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
